creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
Search functionality is not working in Zathura in FreeBSD port (on Arch linux, it's ok).

I can press "/" or "?" for activate search prompt (that is OK), but then, I can't enter any character, all keys are just ignored - ESC for quit from search prompt is working OK.

FreeBSD 11-RC1 + Zathura 0.3.6
